seoTitle: Deception Bay vs Dedin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Deception Bay and Dedin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Deception Bay vs Dedin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deception Bay and Dedin.
heading: Deception Bay vs Dedin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deception Bay, Queensland and Dedin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dedin has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Deception Bay (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deception Bay or Dedin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deception Bay has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Dedin scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deception Bay scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Dedin scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deception Bay or Dedin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dedin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
